_meta.description: Static reference data on Mumbai's water supply system. Update as new official figures are published.
sources: BMC (Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation) Hydraulic Engineering Department, https://mcgm.gov.in

water_balance_mld.note: MLD = Million Litres per Day. Figures are approximate, as reported by BMC in press coverage; exact daily draw varies with system losses and season.

usage_breakdown_percent.note: Approximate sector-wise split of Mumbai's piped water consumption, commonly cited in BMC/press reporting. Treat as indicative, not an official audited figure -- update if BMC publishes a precise breakdown.

required_stock_for_year_ml.note: Total useful lake stock (in million litres) BMC targets by ~Oct 1 (end of monsoon) to cover supply through the following monsoon.
